creator: AWilcox@Wilcox-Tech.com
text:
Created attachment 152395
Updates HFSExplorer port.

* hfsexplorer moved from sf to github, update accordingly.  current version in ports doesn't fetch (404).
* shell scripts now live in dist/bin/ instead of dist/.
* runfsb.sh is now called hfsexplorer.sh, install accordingly.
* 0.23 is a little more portable, and a little portable, all at the same time, so fix up the directory fixing in the .sh files to work with the new scripts.
